article_meta.title: Facebook X Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and CNN’s Clarissa Ward on the state of the war | The Conversation 02

reasoning: Good attribution discipline and several valid author-prose flags, but it missed a major, clear instance of loaded author language ("a scandal-ridden MAGA darling") and other spin, leading to moderate false negatives. Labels used are largely defensible.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items are from the author's own prose; no quoted or clearly attributed source language was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Each flagged phrase reflects interpretive or loaded author wording; no clear overreach.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed prominent author-level bias: "a scandal-ridden MAGA darling" (loaded description of Paxton). Also missed other spin like "continue to scoff," "tall ask," and "stubbornly low approval rating."
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels are mostly reasonable (Spin, Subjective Qualifying Adjectives). Two instances labeled as Negativity Bias are defensible but could also be more precisely tagged as Word Choice/Subjective Qualifiers.
